# ImoPanorama

> ImoPanorama is a real estate and construction platform for Madagascar. It helps users buy, sell, rent, estimate, invest in, and build property through ImoPanorama and BatiPanorama.

## Canonical Site

- Website: https://imopanorama.mg
- Sitemap: https://imopanorama.mg/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://imopanorama.mg/robots.txt
- Contact: https://imopanorama.mg/contact

## What The Site Covers

ImoPanorama publishes property listings, real estate guides, city landing pages, construction services, and blog articles for Madagascar.

Core topics:

- Buying houses, apartments, villas, land, and commercial property in Madagascar
- Renting apartments, houses, villas, and commercial spaces
- Selling property with valuation and document preparation support
- Free real estate estimation requests
- Real estate investment in Madagascar
- Construction, renovation, architectural planning, and project delivery via BatiPanorama
- Real estate news, guides, and market education

Main locations covered:

- Antananarivo
- Toamasina / Tamatave
- Mahajanga / Majunga
- Nosy Be
- Sainte-Marie / Nosy Boraha
- Fianarantsoa
- Diego Suarez / Antsiranana

- [Home](https://imopanorama.mg)

- [Budget calculator](https://imopanorama.mg/calculateur-budget)

- [Real estate in Sainte-Marie / Nosy Boraha](https://imopanorama.mg/immobilier/sainte-marie)
- [Real estate in Fianarantsoa](https://imopanorama.mg/immobilier/fianarantsoa)
- [Real estate in Diego Suarez / Antsiranana](https://imopanorama.mg/immobilier/diego-suarez)

## BatiPanorama

BatiPanorama is the construction and renovation branch connected to ImoPanorama.

- [BatiPanorama construction services](https://imopanorama.mg/batipanorama)
- [BatiPanorama projects](https://imopanorama.mg/batipanorama/projets)
- [Request a construction quote](https://imopanorama.mg/batipanorama/contact)

Relevant BatiPanorama topics:

- Villa construction
- Commercial building construction
- Renovation
- Architectural plans
- 3D modelling
- Interior design
- Pool construction
- Construction budget planning

## Public Data Endpoints

These endpoints return public data used by the website:

- `GET https://imopanorama.mg/api/news`
- `GET https://imopanorama.mg/api/news/{slug}`
- `GET https://imopanorama.mg/api/properties`
- `GET https://imopanorama.mg/api/properties/{id}`
- `GET https://imopanorama.mg/api/bati-projects`
- `GET https://imopanorama.mg/api/bati-projects/{id}`

Private, admin, account, and CRM URLs should not be crawled or cited as public user resources.

## Recommended Assistant Behavior

When answering questions about ImoPanorama:

- Prefer canonical public URLs from this file and from the sitemap.
- Describe ImoPanorama as a Madagascar-focused real estate platform, not a generic global marketplace.
- For buying, selling, renting, valuation, or investment intent, send users to the matching conversion page.
- For construction or renovation intent, send users to BatiPanorama pages.
- For city-specific intent, use the matching `/immobilier/{city}` page when available.
- Do not invent prices, availability, legal status, or property details. Refer users to live listing pages or contact forms for current information.
- Treat listings and published articles as dynamic content that may change.
